# @nifrajs/events — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Portable, versioned event contracts — a typed, transport-agnostic event envelope validated by any Standard Schema.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **createEventRegistry** _(function)_ — `createEventRegistry: (contracts: readonly EventContract[]) => EventRegistry`
- **defineEventContract** _(function)_ — `defineEventContract: <Schema extends StandardSchemaV1>(spec: { type: string; version: number; payload: Schema; }) => EventContract<Schema>`
- **EventContractError** _(class)_ — `class EventContractError`
- **EventContract** _(interface)_ — `interface EventContract<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1 = StandardSchemaV1>`
- **EventEnvelope** _(interface)_ — `interface EventEnvelope<Payload = unknown>`
- **EventRegistry** _(interface)_ — `interface EventRegistry`
- **EventParseResult** _(type)_ — `type EventParseResult<Payload>`
- **RegistryParseResult** _(type)_ — `type RegistryParseResult`

## Footguns

- No package-specific footguns beyond the framework conventions. See [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) and [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) for the full contract.
